6amreads.com

Your morning.
Personalized.

The personalized AI morning newspaper — editorial tone, warm layout, and real utility. One email at 6 AM with lessons for your goals, world news that fits your life, and room to steer what comes next.

Start reading tomorrow morningLog in

How it works

Three steps from signup to your first edition.

  1. 1

    Sign up

    Create your account in seconds — email or Google.

  2. 2

    Answer 7 questions

    We learn your goals, interests, and story — one screen at a time.

  3. 3

    Read at 6 AM

    Your newspaper lands in your inbox, every morning.

What you get

Built like a newspaper — powered for you.

  • Personalized lessons

    Daily coaching that references your goals, role, and hobbies — not generic advice.

  • World news, distilled

    Headlines with context, aligned to what matters to you — with sources you can trust.

  • Feedback loop

    Tell us what to lean into or pull back on; tomorrow's edition listens.

  • Transparent sources

    We point to primary reporting and docs so you can go deeper anytime.

Ready for a calmer morning routine?
